name: NextBoat Inc.
business: Off the Hook YS Inc. is a premier yacht and boat dealership specializing in the buying, selling, and wholesaling of yachts and boats, and also provides financing, servicing, and asset recovery services.

exposures.sentence: We are a premier yacht and boat dealership specializing in the buying, selling, and wholesaling of yachts and boats.
OTH owns and operates WeBuyBoats.com, a fast and efficient platform designed to provide boat owners with immediate cash offers.
Through Azure Funding, OTH provides a range of financing options for recreational boat buyers.
OTH is developing a warranty sales program that will offer buyers additional coverage and peace of mind.

catalysts.event: Scale nationwide broker network to 100 brokers and wholesalers
catalysts.sentence: Scaling operations to 100 brokers and wholesalers by the end of 2026 will drive inventory turnover and significantly increase brokerage sales.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. recreational boating annual sales totaled approximately $56.7 billion in 2022.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. recreational boating industry continues to experience strong growth, with annual sales of boats, marine products, and services totaling approximately $56.7 billion in 2022, according to the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA).

tamClaims.claim: Global recreational boating market valued at USD 30.95 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 43.24 billion by 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: The global recreational boating market was valued at USD 30.95 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 3.40%, reaching USD 43.24 billion by 2034, according to Insurance Journal.
